title: Mercury Bank
html: Stub. Business-banking platform used by Rankett LLC. Diddles got Rankett approved for Mercury and added Yahir as authorized user on Jan 7 2026 (2026 01 07 screenshot 2026 01 07 at 2 36 25 pm 6bfb528e) — same day Rankett LLC became official. First operating-account capitalization: $300 transfer in from Rogue Credit Union on Mar 2 2026 (2026 03 02 screenshot 2026 03 02 at 4 51 43 pm e41ae98d).

related.label: Diddles message — Mercury approved, Rankett LLC official, partnership inclusions
Mercury — $300 transfer in from Rogue Credit Union
